description_long: This is a large, multi-compartment shelving and cabinet unit with a robust metal frame and several wooden panels. The structure features multiple open shelves on the upper section, ideal for displaying or storing items, and a lower section with a series of doors and drawers for enclosed storage. Some of the doors are shown open, revealing interior compartments and dividers, which suggest organized storage for various objects. The side panels and doors are made of wood with a natural finish, while the frame is constructed from black metal tubing, giving it an industrial aesthetic. The unit is freestanding and appears suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban public spaces where secure and organized storage is needed. The overall design is functional, with visible handles on the doors and drawers for easy access.
description: A large, industrial-style shelving and cabinet unit with a black metal frame and natural wood panels, featuring multiple open shelves and enclosed compartments with doors and drawers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open and closed doors and drawers, revealing the internal compartments and shelving.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit and the thickness of the metal frame and wooden panels.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view with all doors closed, displaying the geometric wood panel design and the full shelving structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the alignment of the doors and the layered construction of the shelves and compartments.
